The reference says p=13, m=110. Let's check: 110^4 + 1 mod 13^2. 110 mod 13 is 6. 6^4 + 1 = 1296 + 1 = 1297. 1297 / 169 = 7.67. Actually, the reference says p=13, m=110. 110^4 + 1 mod 169. 110 mod 13 is 6. 6^4 + 1 = 1297. 1297 mod 169 = 114. This doesn't seem to match.
